name: Breadcrumbs
goal: Render a path-navigation strip with intermediate links and a current-page crumb.
description: Static navigation primitive. Accepts both shapes (CDR-005): a JSON items array of { label, href? } or slotted <a>/<span> children. In JSON mode the last item is rendered as the current-page text (or a link if href is present but it's still flagged aria-current=page). In slot mode the last child gets the current styling via ::slotted(:last-child); the component assigns named slot positions on slotchange and renders the configured separator between crumbs.

props.name: items
props.description: JSON array of crumbs ({ label, href? }). When empty, slotted children are used.

slots.description: Slotted crumb elements (typically <a> or <span>) for the slot-mode authoring path.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Current crumb text + hover anchor color.

a11y.notes: Wrapped in <nav aria-label='Breadcrumb'>. The current page is marked with aria-current='page'. The host element also receives aria-label='Breadcrumb' on first connection for assistive-tech consumers that read the outer element.
